news.summary: Levi Strauss & Co. (NYSE: LEVI) is scheduled to announce its second-quarter earnings after the market closes on Thursday, July 10th. Analysts are anticipating earnings of 13 cents per share, a decrease from the 16 cents per share reported in the same period last year. The company is expected to post quarterly revenue of $1.37 billion, a decline from $1.44 billion in the previous year. Notably, Levi Strauss recently finalized an agreement to sell Dockers® to Authentic Brands Group. On Wednesday, Levi Strauss shares closed at $19.23, rising by 1.9%. For more in-depth coverage, visit financial news platform Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Levi Strauss expected to report Q2 earnings at 13 cents/share, down from 16 cents/share last year. Revenue estimated at $1.37B.

news.summary: In Monterey, California on July 3, 2025, The Paddock Monterey is making its first appearance during Monterey Car Week. This event is set to offer a fresh perspective with its strategic schedule, inclusive representation of car brands and historical periods, and a handpicked collection of unique vehicles.
news.headline: The Paddock Monterey debuts at Monterey Car Week 2025, offering a unique lineup and perspective. #MontereyCarWeek2025

news.summary: Almonty Industries Inc. has recently announced the filing of articles of amendment to consolidate its common shares, with a consolidation ratio of 1 post-consolidation Share for every 1.5 pre-consolidation Shares. The Company (TSX: AII) (ASX: AII) (OTCQX: ALMTF) (Frankfurt: ALI), a top global tungsten concentrate producer, received shareholder approval for this move. This consolidation aims to streamline the share structure and improve overall operational efficiency.
news.headline: Almonty Industries plans 1-for-1.5 Share Consolidation for potential Nasdaq listing, approved by shareholders.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, E3 LITHIUM LTD. (TSXV: ETL) (FSE: OW3) (OTCQX: EEMMF), a key player in Canadian lithium, successfully saw approval for all agenda items at its recent Annual General and Special Meeting on July 2, 2025. The Board of Directors proceeded to elect a Chairperson and welcomed a new Chief Financial Officer.
news.headline: E3 Lithium reports successful AGM with election of board chairperson and new CFO, meeting held on July 2, 2025.

news.summary: In Berlin on July 3, 2025, UPENDS is maintaining its dedication to user-focused innovation and strict adherence to regulations during a key period of regulatory changes and sustainability efforts in the vaping sector worldwide. The company is committed to excellence as it navigates through this crucial phase.
news.headline: UPENDS® introduces revolutionary vape system in Europe amid industry changes. Shows commitment to innovation.

news.summary: Polestar, listed as PSNY on Nasdaq, is moving towards broadening its contract manufacturing presence by extending it to Europe. The firm has secured a preliminary agreement with Volvo Cars to produce Polestar 7 at Kosice, Slovakia, for the upcoming debut of the high-end compact SUV in the year 2028. This decision aligns with Polestar's recent strategy to leverage frameworks from the Geely Holding Group.
news.headline: Polestar 7 to be produced in Europe at Kosice, Slovakia, as part of company's strategy for premium compact SUV launch in 2028.

news.summary: In the second quarter, Zinzino group experienced a notable 56% revenue boost compared to the previous year. Specifically, in June, the company's sales markets saw a substantial 71% increase, reaching SEK 255.8 million, up from SEK 149.9 million. In contrast, Faun Pharma witnessed a decline in external sales during this period.
news.headline: Zinzino Q2 revenue up 56% YoY at SEK 255.8 million, sales markets increased by 71% in June. Faun Pharma sales decline.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, in Beijing, it was highlighted that the modernization in China is a distinctive and revolutionary procedure that has reshaped the notion of advancement in the current century. This exclusive and all-encompassing approach combines financial expansion, societal advancement, and ecological durability. Through this model, China has recorded remarkable progress, with significant growth in its economy, improvements in social indicators, and notable strides towards environmental protection.
news.headline: Chinese modernization in 21st century redefines development with focus on economic growth, social progress, and environmental sustainability.

news.summary: EQT Healthcare Growth has announced its acquisition of Europa Biosite, a prominent distributor of more than ten million premium life science reagents to academic and biopharma researchers in Europe and North America. The acquisition, made from Adelis Equity, marks a significant move in EQT's strategy. The company intends to facilitate Europa Biosite's expansion in its upcoming growth phase through commercial support and other strategic initiatives.
news.headline: EQT Healthcare Growth to acquire distributor Europa Biosite, provider of 10M+ life science reagents to researchers.

news.summary: Gold Reserve Ltd. revealed that Dalinar Energy Corporation, its U.S. acquisition subsidiary, has been identified as the Final Recommended Bidder to acquire shares of PDV Holding, Inc., the indirect parent company of CITGO Petroleum Corp. The announcement was made in the Notice of Final Recommendation submitted by the Special Master appointed by the U.S. District Court for the District of Delaware. Gold Reserve Ltd.'s trading symbols are TSX.V: GRZ and OTCQX: GDRZF.
news.headline: Gold Reserve Ltd proposes US$7.382B Citgo bid through Dalinar Energy Corp as recommended by US District Court.

news.summary: NiCE, listed on Nasdaq as NICE, revealed the recipients of its 2025 International CX Excellence Awards in Hoboken, N.J. The awards recognized companies in EMEA and APAC for transforming customer service using NiCE’s AI and automation platform, CXone Mpower. At the Interactions International 2025 event in London, eight organizations were honored. These winners showcase the impact of innovative AI and automation in improving operational efficiency.
news.headline: NiCE announces 2025 CX Excellence Award winners at London event, spotlighting 8 organizations using AI-driven customer service automation to redefine CX.

news.summary: In Altrincham, England, on July 3, 2025, a pioneering study was released in the journal PLOS One. This study delved into the influential behavioral aspects affecting the prescription of medications for individuals with neurodegenerative diseases. The study's revelations prompt crucial inquiries regarding clinical practices.
news.headline: Research by Alpharmaxim analyzes prescribing choices in neurodegenerative diseases, emphasizing the need for optimization. Published in PLOS One, the study reveals behavioural factors impacting medication prescriptions.

news.summary: Luxembourg, July 3, 2025 - Bizcap, a global alternative lender, has recently expanded its operations into Luxembourg, marking the company's initial presence in continental Europe. With established success in regions like Australia, New Zealand, the United Kingdom, and Singapore, Bizcap EU aims to replicate its achievements in these markets by providing financial solutions in the Luxembourgian market. This strategic move signifies Bizcap's commitment to further growth and expansion, leveraging its experience and expertise in offering loans and funding solutions to businesses.
news.headline: Bizcap expands to Europe with Luxembourg launch on July 3, 2025. Continents include Australia, New Zealand, UK, Singapore.

news.summary: LG Innotek has unveiled a groundbreaking technology called "copper post," imperative for modern smartphones. The innovation enables more compact and efficient semiconductor substrates while enhancing heat dissipation. With this advancement, LG Innotek aims to bolster its semiconductor division and cater to the increasing demand for high-performance devices.
news.headline: LG Innotek CEO announces breakthrough in substrate technology with "copper post", revolutionizing industry standards.

news.summary: On July 10, 2025, AS Ekspress Grupp and AS SEB Pank finalized a loan agreement to repay the current EUR 5 million bonds borrowed from LHV pension funds.
news.headline: AS Ekspress Grupp refinances EUR 5 million bonds with AS SEB Pank to be repaid by July 10, 2025.
TURKEY JUNE CONSUMER PRICES RISE 35.05% Y/Y; EST. +35.25%

news.summary: In Tampere, Finland, on July 3, 2025, the energy storage facility provided by Merus Power in Lappeenranta, Finland, was finalized and operational for the market on May 15, 2025. This facility, owned by a partnership between Ardian’s Clean Energy Evergreen Fund and local energy provider Lappeenrannan Energia, stands as one of the most prominent energy storage sites within the Finnish electricity sector. Boasting an impressive production capacity of around 38 megawatts and an energy capacity of 43 megawatt hours, this energy storage facility is a flagship project for Merus Power. It marks a significant milestone for the company, being the largest energy storage installation ever produced by Merus Power.
news.headline: Finland's energy storage facility in Lappeenranta completed by Merus Power, valued at EUR 15 million, with 38MW output and 43MWh energy.

news.summary: Gilles Deleuze, a French philosopher, famously claimed that art originates from disorder. Today, his perspective is gaining significance in a world heavily influenced by artificial intelligence.
news.headline: Gilles Deleuze believed creativity arises from chaos; now, AI world gives it new perspective.

news.summary: In Singapore, a collaboration between the International Swaps and Derivatives Association (ISDA) and Ant International under Project Guardian FX has resulted in the development of a new report. This report outlines the implementation of tokenised bank liabilities and a shared ledger system in cross-border payments and foreign exchange (FX) settlement. This joint effort, formed under the Monetary Authority of Singapore's (MAS) Project Guardian initiative, aims to enhance liquidity and efficiency in the industry. The report is part of a global effort involving policymakers and industry stakeholders, focusing on improving processes in cross-border payments and FX settlement.
news.headline: ISDA and Ant International lead Project Guardian to develop report on tokenized bank liabilities for FX settlement, under MAS.

news.summary: In MEUDON, France, digital wallet company Curve has strengthened its partnership with Thales, a prominent player in technology, to enhance secure payment solutions for financial institutions. This move follows the recent introduction of Curve Pay on iOS, a milestone in mobile payment services. The aim is to revolutionize daily transactions, providing Curve customers with the convenience of NFC payments on their devices. This collaboration signifies a momentous stride towards modernizing payment experiences, emphasizing the company's commitment to innovation and security.
news.headline: Curve partners with Thales to enhance iPhone digital wallets security, enabling NFC payments for customers.

news.summary: A collaboration between companies in Leuven, Belgium and Boston has been announced, aiming to enhance access to extensive mobile application security amidst the fast-evolving mobile threat landscape. This partnership seeks to provide advanced protection in the Android ecosystem and beyond, addressing the increasing challenges posed by mobile security threats. The collaboration is set to benefit a wide range of users and stakeholders, with the aim of bolstering the security measures available for mobile applications.
news.headline: Verdane Invests in Guardsquare to expand mobile security solutions globally. Partnership to improve access to comprehensive app security.

news.summary: In Geneva, Medimaps Group S.A., a prominent player in AI-based bone microarchitecture imaging solutions, has introduced its latest TBS Osteo Advanced software in Europe after receiving MDR clearance. This new software, which was recently launched in the US, demonstrates the company's dedication to enhancing osteoporosis identification and bone health care across the globe. The advanced software provides improved correction for soft tissue thickness, reinforcing Medimaps' efforts to revolutionize bone health management.
news.headline: Medimaps Group launches TBS Osteo Next-Generation Software in Europe for advanced bone microarchitecture assessment, following US launch.

news.summary: In Grand-Lancy, Switzerland, Temenos, a prominent player in banking technology (SIX: TEMN), has achieved the remarkable feat of being recognized as the 4th most sustainable company globally by TIME magazine and Statista. Standing out among 500 sustainability frontrunners worldwide, Temenos holds the distinction of being the top-ranking Swiss company and the sole core banking software provider to secure a position in the top 40. TIME's assessment encompasses over 20 key performance metrics, evaluating aspects such as ESG transparency and environmental footprint.
news.headline: Temenos ranked 4th on TIME's list of most sustainable companies, highest Swiss company, and only core banking software in top 40.

news.summary: In ZUG, Switzerland, AMINA Bank AG, regulated by the Swiss Financial Market Supervisory Authority (FINMA), has made history by becoming the world's first bank to provide direct support for Ripple USD (RLUSD), a stablecoin pegged at a value equal to the US dollar. This move showcases a combination of stability, efficiency, and adherence to regulations. Initially, AMINA Bank will offer custody and trading services to its clients who hold RLUSD, laying the groundwork for future service enhancements.
news.headline: AMINA Bank in Switzerland supports Ripple USD (RLUSD), first to do so globally, providing stability, efficiency, and compliance to clients.

news.summary: In Paris, during this year's Prime Day, the spotlight is on the FLOOR ONE S9 Artist. Renowned for its top-notch quality, stellar performance, and smooth operation, Tineco's leading floor washer can now be purchased at a special rate of €599 as opposed to its regular price of €899 — marking the biggest discount of the year, with the promotion running until July 11. The S9 Artist is designed to streamline cleaning processes, ensuring quicker, more efficient, and even pleasant experience by simultaneously vacuuming and washing, and automatically adapting to different surfaces.
news.headline: Prime Day deal on Tineco's FLOOR ONE S9 Artist floor washer, now €599 instead of €899 - lowest price of the year.
